ddt:Target.Name: RCM E33_V7
ddt:Target.Description:
RCM (Roof Control Unit) / Unite controle de toit Projet : E33 Damien PERROT (ITlink) - 01 69 82 83 18
Version 7 : Inversion capteurs couvercle G et D sur écran RCM status seul (pas de modification DTC capteurs couvercle D et G)
Version 6: -> déplacement du bit HallSensorActivationStatus.RCM_DID_HallSensor5_Status
Version 5 : -> Inversion capteurs AVD et AVG & Inversion capteurs couvercle G et D -> Suppression super-securité dans écran -> Compteur cycle + compteur km corrigés -> Normalisation nom DID HallsensorActivationStatus -> Ajout auto iden soft 3.0.x et 4.0.x
Version 4 : -> Ajout bouton Routine -> CRC sur 2 octets ald 3 octets
Version 3 : Ajout de paramètres -> incompatible avec proto A et base v2 pour tout ce qui est LIN et CCM (problème littre endian/big endian) -> suppression écran LIN (remplacé par diag CCM) -> correction longueur de CRC et trame VIN
Version 2 : Modifications apportées 21/11/08 AJOUT -> Désignation des capteurs dans ecran Roof status -> Ajout data ECU Identification ($F187) et Kit assembly ($F18E) -> Ecran CCM -> Ajout affichage trame RST_Roof_condition_display
MODIFICATION -> Lin Right Window position (little Endian) -> correction seuil ECU voltage, hall sensor supply Voltage ,... -> Suppression ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData, ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage, ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot, ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC, -> Routine completed and not OK (03 ald 04) -> version logiciel
Version 1 : 05/08/08

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Description:
Certains services sont interdits dans certains modes de diagnostics

(ex:ReadMemoryByAddress interdit au SAV)

Le mode de fonctionnement par défaut avant l'envoi d'une requête

"StartDiagnosticSession" est le mode Après Vente

format données:

10 00

| |_______ A0 pour le mode Diagnostic Etudes

| B0 pour le mode Diagnostic Contrôles en chaîne

| C0 pour le mode Diagnostic Après Vente

| 80 pour le mode Diag Fournisseur

|

|_________octet requête "StartDiagnosticSession"

Item.Text: Non validé en attente de référencement
Mémorisé au cycle précédent + Alerte IHM disparue
Présent et mémorisé + Alerte IHM présente

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: Roof on Wind Frame - Ready To Latch
Roof on Wind Frame - Ready To Latch
No possible classification about the type of fault
Open circuit or Short circuit to ground
Open circuit or Short circuit to battery
Roof on Wind Frame - Ready To Latch
Roof on Wind Frame - Ready To Latch
Trunk Cover not Latched Left Side
Trunk Cover not Latched Right Side
Trunk Cover not Latched Right Side
Trunk Cover not Latched Left Side

Request.Name: Lecture du VIN
Request.Comment: Lecture du VIN du véhicule

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Spécification du type de diagnostic désiré

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: Ecriture VIN
Request.Comment: Service d'écriture du code VIN dans l'UCE.

Request.Name: ReadData.RCM CAN Status
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier

Request.Name: ReadData.RCM LIN Status
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier

Request.Name: ReadData.RCM Status
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession_Development
Request.Comment: Spécification du type de diagnostic désiré

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ECUReset
Request.Comment: Reset ECU

Request.Name: ReadData.RCM Parameter
Request.Comment: Parameter set number

Request.Name: StartRoutineFullOpeningCycle
Request.Comment: Start Routine Roof system Full opening cycle

Request.Name: StartRoutineRoofOpeningCycle
Request.Comment: Start Routine Only Roof opening cycle

Request.Name: StartRoutineTrunkCoverOpeningCycle
Request.Comment: Start Routine Only Trunk Cover opening cycle

Request.Name: StartRoutineSuperSecurityEngaged
Request.Comment: Start Routine Only Super Security Motor Engaged Movement

Request.Name: StartRoutineFullRoofClosingCycle
Request.Comment: Start Routine Roof system full Closing cycle

Request.Name: StartRoutineRoofClosingCycle
Request.Comment: Start Routine Only Roof Closing cycle

Request.Name: StartRoutineTrunkCoverClosingCycle
Request.Comment: Start Routine Only Trunk Cover opening cycle

Request.Name: StartRoutineSuperSecurityDisengaged
Request.Comment: Start Routine Only Super Security Motor Disengaged Movement

Request.Name: StopRoutineFullOpeningCycle
Request.Comment: Stop Routine Roof system full Opening Cycle

Request.Name: StopRoutineRoofOpeningCycle
Request.Comment: Stop Routine only Roof Opening Cycle

Request.Name: StopRoutineTrunkCoverOpeningCycle
Request.Comment: Stop Routine only Trunk cover Opening Cycle

Request.Name: StopRoutineSuperSecurityEngaged
Request.Comment: Stop Routine only Super security engaged movement

Request.Name: StopRoutineSuperSecurityDisengaged
Request.Comment: Stop Routine only Super security disengaged movement

Request.Name: StopRoutineFullClosingCycle
Request.Comment: Stop Routine Roof system Full Closing cycle

Request.Name: StopRoutineRoofClosingCycle
Request.Comment: Stop Routine only Roof Closing Cycle

Request.Name: StopRoutineTrunkCoverClosingCycle
Request.Comment: Stop Routine only Trunk cover Closing Cycle

Request.Name: LectureTracabilite_ calculateur
Request.Comment: Permet de lire les informations de traçabilité du calculateur

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Test.Description: Any of the received CAN frames missing for t > 2 sec or NM failure detected
LIN message CCM_LIN_RST_01 missing for t > 2 sec
(U_Sensor > 1,391V and U_Sensor < 2,861V for t > tbd sec
(U_Sensor > 1,391V and U_Sensor < 2,861V for t > tbd sec
(U_Sensor > 1,391V and U_Sensor < 2,861V for t > tbd sec
(U_Sensor > 1,391V and U_Sensor < 2,861V for t > tbd sec
(U_Sensor > 1,391V and U_Sensor < 2,861V for t > tbd sec
(U_Sensor > 1,391V and U_Sensor < 2,861V for t > tbd sec
(U_Sensor > 1,391V and U_Sensor < 2,861V for t > tbd sec

Device.Name: Hall Sensor power supply
Device.Mnemonic: Hall sensor Voltage out of Limit

Test.Description: Eeprom checksum calculation failed after startup
RAM or ROM test failure after startup
State of read back relay information does match expected state from relay control for t > 100ms

Label.Text: Attention, les boutons ci dessous permettent d'ouvrir une session developpement, d'envoyer le start routine puis le stop routine. Attention aux dommages sur véhicule et corporels possibles liés à ces manipulations
